creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #6)

OK, yes! I appreciate it.

It is also worth noting that the CVE fix was already applied in REVISION 3 (FreeBSD version 5.9.11_3).

Regarding the other (documentation) fix, I have submitted a patch upstream, that if accepted (I don't have high hopes), those patches will not be needed.

Also, there is another patch that should no longer be needed.

I will re-submit once the dust settles.

Thank you!
